cv_content.about: I lead end-to-end delivery of high-impact technology and AI transformation projects, bridging technical teams and business outcomes as a trusted client partner. As founder of Mottum Analytica, I structure and ship AI, cloud, and data engagements — from UNDP-backed prototypes to enterprise GTM — combining a data-driven mindset with hands-on delivery. I thrive in builder environments where I can own the client relationship, manage risk, and turn strategy into measurable ROI.

bullets: Lead end-to-end delivery of AI, Data, and BI transformation projects for enterprise clients across Spain and internationally, acting as trusted client partner bridging technical teams and business outcomes.
Structured and closed partnership agreements with the UN Development Programme (UNDP) to embed AI tools and systems in public institutions.
Drive GTM and technology roadmap translation for AI/cloud product launches, including market mapping, pricing, and ICP definition.
Built and manage a cross-functional delivery team of data engineers, analysts, and consultants using agile, data-driven delivery practices.
Redesigned fraud detection and mitigation workflows end-to-end, improving financial risk management efficiency by 35% through data-driven process design.
Led cross-functional operations coordinating product, finance, and ops teams across last-mile delivery.
Designed KPI frameworks and dashboards for real-time operational performance and financial risk tracking.
Delivered weekly executive reporting on risk metrics, aligning stakeholders on improvement initiatives.
Led launch and delivery of Polestar's telematics service for B2B fleet clients, aligning technical feature development with client requirements.
Managed full B2B engagement cycle end-to-end: prospecting, pitching, negotiation, and contract close, growing revenue 15% in year one.
Coordinated with product and technical teams to translate client needs into roadmap priorities.
Built a market entry and delivery playbook later adopted as a template across other European markets.
Led CX/NPS transformation programmes across 10 European markets for a top-tier client, managing delivery workstreams and C-level stakeholders.
Developed go-to-market and digital transformation strategy for Polestar Iberia ahead of the brand's Spanish launch.
Built business cases and ROI models for digital transformation initiatives to support executive decision-making.
Ran client workshops and executive presentations, translating technical solutions into business outcomes.
Managed a portfolio of B2B clients on Amadeus analytics platforms, acting as primary liaison between clients and product teams.
Improved client engagement by 30% through proactive success planning and product adoption programmes.
Reduced onboarding time-to-value from 6 weeks to 3 weeks via structured training and delivery.
Built client health scorecards to proactively identify at-risk accounts and mitigate churn.

referrals.name: Adrien Palumbo
referrals.title: Managing Director Spain
referrals.quote: Nico has a rare ability to bridge commercial strategy and operational execution. He was instrumental in building our Iberian go-to-market — precise, fast, and deeply reliable.

referrals.name: Javier Bordetas
referrals.title: Director
referrals.quote: What sets Nico apart is his clarity. He can walk into a complex stakeholder environment and come out with a plan that everyone buys into. An exceptional consultant.
